user_intent: Close-up of a runner who just finished, hands on knees catching breath, dripping with sweat. Hard dramatic lighting. Urban night setting. This is the 'I showed up' moment — the check-in. Raw athletic energy like an Oakley athlete portrait.

subject.description: Black man, late 20s, athletic build, deep rich dark brown skin absolutely drenched in sweat, sweat dripping from his nose and chin, veins visible on forearms, bent over with hands gripping just above his knees, looking up at camera with an exhausted but satisfied half-smile like he just conquered something, short twist-out hairstyle with sweat beads in it, chest heaving
clothing: soaking wet black cotton tee clinging to his body from sweat
neon lime green shoes visible at bottom of frame
accessories: Apple Watch showing a green ring completion on wrist

scene.location: Deep Ellum street corner in Dallas Texas at night, a neon sign casting lime green light from above camera left, brick wall with graffiti art behind him slightly out of focus, steam rising from a street grate adding atmosphere
scene.weather: hot and humid summer night, visible humidity in the air

lighting.direction: hard overhead key light from slightly camera left creating dramatic shadows under brow and chin, neon lime green fill from a sign camera left, faint orange ambient from a distant streetlight camera right

materials.secondary: aged brick wall with spray paint
materials.texture: wet glistening skin texture is the star, every sweat bead and pore visible

composition.framing: extreme close-up, frame filled with his face and shoulders, sweat drops in the foreground out of focus creating bokeh orbs, almost uncomfortably intimate
composition.angle: straight on eye level, he is bent over hands on knees and looking up directly into the camera lens, confrontational and raw like a portrait by Platon
composition.focus_subject: his eyes and the sweat running down his face, razor sharp, sweat drops between his face and camera creating foreground bokeh spheres

quality.sharpness: razor-sharp on face and sweat detail, you should be able to count individual sweat beads
quality.post_processing: high contrast cinematic grade, crushed deep blacks, neon color cast from environment, slight film grain, skin detail enhanced not smoothed, raw and real not glamorous, Oakley athlete portrait grade

negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, watermark, text overlay, distorted hands, extra fingers, cartoon, illustration, soft lighting, beauty retouching, smooth skin filter, airbrushed, stock photo, posed, fake sweat, gym interior, clean and dry
